title: Adding modules to Workflows - Formula and "Do Nothing" to If/Else statements
excerpt:
Can we get a “Do Nothing” option for the If/Else condition on Workflows? 
Also, having the option to have a formula for conditional requirements would be nice too.

posts.author: DanCrum (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we get a “Do Nothing” option for the If/Else condition on Workflows?

Also, having the option to have a formula for conditional requirements would be nice too.

posts.author: jbreen3ki (JJ Breen)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DanCrum , can you clarify your request on the “Do Nothing” option? Right now, when I create an If/Else statement, I can leave either the “Yes” or “No” branch bare/empty.

I’ve seen posts from Monday about adding the formula column as a condition for both automations and workflows, but I haven’t seen any recent movement on that.
